creator: wahjava@gmail.com
text:
Andrej Zverev writes:
> Hello, I have few questions to you.
> 1. What was you previous FreeBSD version before you migrate to 8.0BETA3 ?

8.0-BETA2

> 2. If it was not clean install, then did you force rebuild all ports
> that you have installed?

It was a clean install. But since there was a shared library bump in the
base system, I've to rebuild all of my ports :( .

> 3. Is you default brower is firefox, if you start it from CLI: firefox
> http://cpan.uwinnipeg.ca/search?query=Padre%3A%3APlugin%3A%3A&mode=dist
> it's will run OK?

How do you check for default browser ? I don't use GNOME or KDE. I use
Xmonad, where I boot from .xinitrc. I don't have firefox executable on
my box, instead I have firefox3. And firefox3 opens that URL just
fine. Though padre with that diff (mailed in the PR) opens the conkeror
(xulrunner-based) browser, but with just its homepage open, not the URL.

HTH
-- 
Ashish SHUKLA
